summary: Parses an extended field value string and returns the decoded text when the declared character encoding is supported.
signature_intent: Accepts a single string-form extended field value and returns a decoded string, or throws a TypeError.
behavior: Validates that the input has the required extended field value format.
Treats the declared character encoding case-insensitively.
Decodes percent-escaped bytes before interpreting the text.
Returns the decoded text on success.
edge_cases: Malformed input throws TypeError with an invalid-value message.
Unsupported character encoding throws TypeError with an unsupported-encoding message.
Uppercase or mixed-case supported encodings are accepted.
forbidden_details: Repository and source path details are omitted.
